calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-12-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deniz Duran Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per.
Gercek Karakus Defendant/Appellant in Pro Per.

Parties are sworn.

The Court inquires as to how the judgment amount was formulated.
Plaintiff /Respondent outlines the prior judgment. The Court and parties discuss the details of the case and discuss the prior related case.

At the close of the hearing, the Court rules as follows:

The Court affirms the judgment.

With the prior Judgment in related case CSM-23-867621 being in favor of defendant, Karakus, and considering the current affirmed judgment in favor of plaintiff, Duran, in this case; The Court notes the difference in the amount of $162.00. Should this amount be paid by defendant to plaintiff both cases would be resolved.

Defendant/appellant, Karakus sends payment in the amount of $162.00 to Plaintiff/Respondent.
Plaintiff/Respondent, Deniz confirms receipt of $162.00

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2024 Set For Trial On Sep-12-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 504

Off Calendar Sep-12-2024 Continued To Sep-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
